title: Trading Corner: Bulk Trade-in Event
content_html: Turn your bulk commons and uncommons into store credit! We're running a special trade-in event this Saturday starting at 10 AM.

title: Weekly Deal: Buy 3 Boosters, Get 1 Free!
content_html: This week only, buy any 3 TCG boosters and get the 4th one free. Valid across MTG, Pokémon, and Yu-Gi-Oh.

title: Upcoming Tournament: Pokémon Regional Qualifier
content_html:
Battle for the Top!

Registration opens this Friday. Limited slots available. Format: Standard.

title: Weekly Shop Update
content_html:
New space and better lighting!

We've finished redecorating the play area. Come by and see the new displays. We also have a new coffee machine for those long tournament rounds.

See you all this week!

title: Collector's Corner: Grading your cards
content_html:
Is that 10 worth it?

Many customers ask if they should grade their pulls. Here's our quick guide on what to look for: centering, surface, edges, and corners.

We provide a pre-grading service here at the shop to help you decide!

title: Tournament Report: Regional Qualifiers
content_html:
What a weekend!

Over 100 players gathered for our RQ last Saturday. The meta was dominated by combo decks, but a rogue aggro pilot took down the whole thing.

"I didn't expect to win, I just played what I liked." - Winner

Next big event is the Store Championship in July!

title: New Pokémon 151 Restock Incoming
content_html:
The Kanto starters are back.

We've secured a massive shipment of Elite Trainer Boxes and Booster Bundles for the 151 set. Don't miss your chance to complete your master set!

Available starting this Friday. We'll also have a limited supply of special promo cards for the first 10 customers.

title: Modern Horizons 3: The Full Spoiler is Here!
content_html:
Prepare your wallets!

The latest Magic set is finally revealed in its entirety. We're seeing some incredible reprints and brand new powerhouses for Modern and Commander alike.

Top Picks

  • Eldrazi Support: Massive titans are back.
  • New Elementals: A new cycle of evoke-like effects.

CHECK THIS OUT: We already have This Incredible Card in stock!

Stay tuned for our pre-release events next weekend.
